---
title: "ShortRead_Hygiene.qmd"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Importing Libraries

```{r}
# Rqc, ShortRead, QuasR and ggplot2
library(Rqc)
library(ShortRead)
library(QuasR)
library(ggplot2)

```

```{r}
qc_result <- rqc(path = "data/raw_reads/MiSeq_SOP/", "*.fastq")
```

```{r}
p_avg <- rqcReadQualityBoxPlot(qc_result[1:3])
ggsave("figures/average_quality.png", plot = p_avg)
p_avg
```

```{r}
p_qual <- rqcCycleQualityBoxPlot(qc_result)+
  geom_hline(yintercept = 30, color = "green", linetype = "dashed")
ggsave("figures/quality_boxplot.png", plot = p_qual, width=(21.0*2), height=(29.7*2), units="cm" ) 
p_qual
```

```{r}
p_base <- rqcCycleBaseCallsLinePlot(qc_result)
ggsave("figures/base_content.png", plot = p_base, width=(21.0*2), height=(29.7*2), units="cm" )
p_base
```

```{r}
p_freq <- rqcReadFrequencyPlot(qc_result[1:3])
ggsave("figures/read_frequency.png", plot = p_freq)
p_freq
```
